trigger: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'email')
summary: checkout-service crashed on /api/checkout after the SDK captured TypeError. Splunk context shows 9 matching errors.
rootCause: Checkout code assumes a user object exists before accessing user.email during payment execution.

reasons: Current error volume is more than three standard deviations above baseline.
Failure affects checkout, payment, auth, or user data flow.

evidence.message: SDK captured TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'email')
Checkout handler attempted to access user.email
Checkout handler attempted payment with missing user context

timeline.title: api
timeline.detail: Checkout handler attempted to access user.email

timeline.title: splunk
timeline.detail: First matching checkout TypeError seen in Splunk

timeline.title: splunk
timeline.detail: Repeated matching failures crossed demo threshold

proposedFix.explanation: Guard the authenticated user before payment execution and return a typed 401 response when user context is absent.
steps: Add a user guard before reading user.email.
Add a regression test for anonymous checkout submission.
Deploy with release metadata so Talos can correlate future regressions.
